title: SUPERnatural+ Creatine Electrolytes - SUPERsalty Original (7-Pack)
description: This advanced hydration formula combines performance electrolytes with 5 g of creatine monohydrate to support strength, recovery, and cognitive focus in one convenient sachet. Designed to go beyond basic hydration, it helps fuel muscle contraction and optimize performance during training and throughout the day. With a balanced electrolyte profile, including 500 mg of sodium, it supports fluid balance and muscle function while ensuring consistent daily creatine intake. Ideal for workouts, lighter sessions, or rest days, it delivers reliable, all-in-one support for performance, hydration, and daily strength.

title: David Peanut Butter Chocolate
description: Peanut Butter Chocolate delivers a rich, dessert-inspired protein experience with a fluffy peanut butter–flavored core and smooth peanut ganache. Layered with creamy peanut butter ganache, topped with crispy inclusions, and coated in chocolate, it offers a perfectly balanced blend of nutty richness and indulgent sweetness. The airy, whipped center creates a light, melt-in-your-mouth texture, while the added crunch provides a satisfying bite. Designed to elevate protein into a premium treat, it combines indulgent flavor with a lighter, more enjoyable snacking experience.

title: The Power of the 4Cs Bundle
description: Introducing The Power of the 4Cs Collab, a simple, daily, science-backed routine to support women through the natural shifts that start in their 30s. Featuring four trusted essentials: * Drink ZYN Turmeric with Curcumin for natural inflammation support * Pillar Performance Collagen for tendons + joints * Atlantic Creatine for strength + cognitive performance * Xandro Lab Calcium for bone health As collagen dips, muscle repair slows, and bone density changes, the 4Cs help you stay strong, recover better, and move ahead with confidence.
descriptionHtml:
Introducing The Power of the 4Cs Collab, a simple, daily, science-backed routine to support women through the natural shifts that start in their 30s.

Featuring four trusted essentials:

* Drink ZYN Turmeric with Curcumin for natural inflammation support

* Pillar Performance Collagen for tendons + joints

* Xandro Lab Calcium for bone health

As collagen dips, muscle repair slows, and bone density changes, the 4Cs help you stay strong, recover better, and move ahead with confidence.

title: Chief. Nutrition Collagen Powder Vanilla 450g
description: Chief. Collagen Powder Vanilla supports glowing skin, stronger nails, muscle recovery, joints and tendons, and gut health with a smooth, creamy collagen protein. Made from hydrolysed grass-fed bovine collagen, it delivers highly bioavailable Type I and III collagen for optimal absorption. Blended with natural vanilla flavour and gently digestible buttermilk, it contains almost zero sugar and is naturally sweetened with monk fruit, without artificial sweeteners or sugar alcohols. Tested for purity and free from heavy metals, pesticides, and herbicides, it offers clean, reliable daily support. Perfect as a vanilla milkshake, in smoothies, yoghurt, coffee, or baking—an easy and delicious way to add high-quality protein to your daily routine.

title: Chief. Chipotle & Lime Biltong 30g
description: Chief. Chipotle & Lime Biltong offers a clean, high-protein snack to satisfy savoury cravings with a naturally tender texture. Made from organic, grass-fed and grass-finished beef, it is slowly air-dried for superior quality, delivering a healthier and more flavorful alternative to traditional jerky. Free from unnecessary additives and low in sugar, it provides a convenient source of protein to support active lifestyles. Perfect as a pre- or post-workout snack or as a light, nutritious option between meals, it also adds a high-quality protein boost to salads, pizzas, and everyday dishes.

title: PURE O.N.E. Omega 30's
description: Pure Encapsulations O.N.E. Omega is expertly formulated to support healthy inflammatory responses and promote the natural resolution of inflammation. With 1,000 mg of triglyceride-form EPA/DHA in each softgel, it delivers twice the potency of other fish oils, enhancing joint and connective tissue integrity while promoting cardiovascular health. Extracted using supercritical CO2 and processed at low temperatures in an oxygen-free environment, this formula prevents oxidation. Each batch is rigorously tested for environmental contaminants, oxidation, rancidity, and microbial contamination, ensuring high quality and purity for optimal wellness.

title: PURE Coriolus extract 60's
description: Pure CoriolusExtract provides targeted immune support with a hot water mushroom extract designed to promote healthy white blood cell number and function. Derived from Coriolus versicolor, also known as turkey tail mushroom, this formula is traditionally used to enhance immune function and energy while supporting balanced immune responses. Rich in beta-glucans, it contributes to antibody production, cytokine balance, and a healthy gut microflora. Produced from organic, wild-crafted mushrooms using a carefully controlled hot water extraction process, it ensures optimal concentration of key bioactive compounds for effective, high-quality immune support.

title: LMNT Recharge Electrolytes - Chocolate Salt
description: Start every day feeling refreshed. LMNT’s Recharge Electrolytes - Chocolate Salt is crafted with a precise blend of sodium, magnesium, and potassium to help replenish minerals lost through daily activity, exercise, or simply a busy lifestyle. title: Thorne 5-MTHF 1mg 60's
description: Thorne 5-MTHF 1mg was formulated for individuals whose genetic makeup makes it difficult for them to convert folic acid into 5-MTHF (L-5-Methyltetrahydrofolate), the active form of folic acid. The Centers for Disease Control recommends folic acid supplementation for all women of childbearing age. Folic acid intake is important during early pregnancy when a woman many not beware she is pregnant. 5-MTHF helps the production of serotonin, melatonin, dopamine, epinephrine, and norepinephrine.

title: Thorne Melaton-3 60's
description: Thorne's Melaton-3 provides three mg of melatonin in each capsule. Melatonin is the primary hormone of the pineal gland that helps the body to maintain normal circadian rhythms. Melaton-3 promotes the resynchronization of this cycle for those with sleep difficulty. Melatonin supplementation can benefit those who have difficulty sleeping due to the aging body's ability to synthesize melatonin from the amino acid tryptophan. Melaton-3 is NSF Certified for Sport to ensure labels claims that of the absence of banned substances because athletes need to know their supplements are trustworthy and compliant.

title: Thorne Hormone Advantage (Dim Advantage) 60's
description: Thorne’s Hormone Advantage (formerly DIM Advantage) combines diindolylmethane (DIM), pomegranate extract, and sulforaphane glucosinolate (SGS; from broccoli seed extract) to support balanced hormone health by helping the body metabolize and detoxify excess estrogen. Imbalances in hormones, particularly estrogen and progesterone, can significantly influence a woman’s monthly cycle. Excess estrogens are linked to irregular, heavy, or uncomfortable menstrual cycles. These hormone imbalances can also contribute to breast tenderness, bloating, and mood changes related to PMS.

title: Thorne Glycine 250's
description: Feel your best with glycine, a gentle amino acid that’s naturally present in your body and diet. Glycine is a key building block for proteins, helping to keep your body’s foundations strong. It also plays a part in the creation of creatine—a molecule that helps supply energy to your muscles and nerves, so you can stay active and alert throughout your day. Glycine is involved in the regulation of bile acid synthesis and glucose use, supporting your body’s natural energy production. With Thorne’s Glycine, you’re giving your body a simple, science-backed ingredient to help you feel balanced, every day.

The easy-to-consume calcium and magnesium supplement is in an optimally absorbed form, so the minerals can get to work right away. Magnesium and calcium work together in muscle cells – magnesium causes muscle fibers to relax, while calcium causes them to contract. And because the heart is a muscle these minerals are both important to help maintain normal hearth rhythm.

title: YPSI Magnesium Tri-Komplex
description: Magnesium in three forms – for everyday life, training and recovery. Magnesium is an essential mineral, central to energy, nerve function and psychological function. During active phases or when the diet is unbalanced, it may be useful to pay attention to targeted nutrition. The YPSI Magnesium Tri-Komplex combines three high-quality, organic magnesium compounds in one capsule: magnesium bisglycinate, magnesium malate and magnesium citrate. The combination uses different absorption pathways in the body for a versatile, bioavailable and targeted supply.

title: YPSI Inositol Komplex
description: Some nutrients remain in the background for a long time – until you realize their potential. Like myo-inositol: a vitamin-like substance produced naturally in the body that is found in almost all cells – particularly concentrated in the brain, heart muscle, and skeletal muscles. The YPSI Inositol Komplex combines pure myo-inositol with glycine, taurine, and three bioavailable magnesium compounds – for targeted supplementation in everyday life, during training, or as part of a conscious evening routine. Magnesium contributes to the normal function of the nervous system and mental function – and helps reduce tiredness and fatigue. Inositol—more precisely, myo-inositol—is a vitamin-like substance produced by the body itself and found in almost all cells. Particularly high concentrations are found in the brain, heart, and muscle tissue. Although inositol is produced endogenously, many people consciously choose to supplement their intake.

title: Momentous Rhodiola Rosea
description: Rhodiola rosea, also known as golden root, supports your body’s response to stress, boosts cognitive function, and enhances aerobic performance. This adaptogenic plant is renowned for its ability to reduce stress and fatigue by regulating cortisol levels. Its active compounds, rosavin and salidroside, work synergistically to promote balance, improving both physical and mental resilience. By supporting the body's natural stress response, Rhodiola Rosea improves both mental and physical endurance, making it an ideal supplement for those seeking enhanced performance in daily life and athletic activities. This formula delivers 100mg of Rhodiola Rosea root extract per serving, providing concentrated support for stress management, cognition, and physical performance.

title: Momentous Recovery Grass-Fed Whey - Chocolate

It combines fast-absorbing grass-fed whey isolate with a targeted 2:1 ratio of carbohydrates to protein—ideal for supporting recovery after intense exercise. This formula provides protein to support muscle mass and bone maintenance, along with magnesium to support muscle function, reduce tiredness and fatigue, and maintain electrolyte balance. It also includes ProHydrolase®, a clinically studied enzyme blend that helps break down protein efficiently for optimal amino acid availability. With added electrolytes, a smooth chocolate flavour, and no artificial ingredients, this clean recovery shake helps you stay consistent and well-nourished between sessions.

title: Pillar Performance Motion Armour Joint Longevity - Tab 60s
description: MOTION ARMOUR Joint Longevity is a first-to-market combination of patented ingredients NEM®, 5-LOXIN® along with curcumin to provide an extensive natural joint protection formulation. Developed specifically to maintain joint cartilage health and support joint mobility/flexibility in highly active people, while also relieving mild joint inflammation, pain and stiffness. NEM® is the patented egg shell membrane ingredient from Stratum Nutrition. NEM® is the world’s most clinically trialled egg shell membrane product and has clinical studies showing positive results to help support joints against pain, stiffness and inflexibility. 5-LOXIN® is a patented, clinically-studied boswellia extract with clinical trials showing positive benefit specifically for cartilage break-down. Every batch of the 5-LOXIN® harvest is traceable to a specific region and set of trees. 5-LOXIN® is strictly tested and must comply with predefined specifications at different stages of product manufacturing.

Additionally, tocotrienols may assist in stabilizing cholesterol levels, while also nourishing skin and hair health. This product is sold by IMI

title: Quicksilver Scientific Ultra Binder® Capsules
description: We are continuously being bombarded by toxins – from the air we breathe to the foods we eat, making toxicity a real modern-day health issue. Proper detoxification requires excretion of toxins from the body, and elimination through the gastrointestinal tract and stool is one of the most effective toxin elimination pathways. Binding agents are natural compounds that “catch” toxins in the gastrointestinal tract to aid in their removal, preventing reabsorption. Ultra Binder® is a comprehensive combination of binding agents including activated charcoal, bentonite clay, chitosan, zeolite, and Quicksilver’s proprietary mercury-binding complex, IMD®. This broad-spectrum formulation binds to many toxins such as heavy metals, pesticides, herbicides, hormone mimics, food additives, mold, and microbes for removal from the body.

title: Quicksilver Scientific GABA + L-Theanine
description: Ongoing stress has, unfortunately, become commonplace in our modern-day society. This type of stress induces a profound shift in the nervous system, skewing the body towards a heightened sympathetic “fight-or-flight” response and dampens our parasympathetic “rest-and-digest” response. Liposomal GABA with L-Theanine combines a highly bioavailable form of the neurotransmitter GABA, with the amino acid L-theanine for optimal nervous system support, helping you maintain a calm and relaxed state in an otherwise frenetic world. Gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA) is the body’s main inhibitory ‘calm and connect’ neurotransmitter and produced in the brain and spinal cord. It supports emotional balance and ease, a healthy stress response, and stable nerve transmission.

title: WHOOP 4.0 with 12 Month Subscription
description: WHOOP 4.0 is more than just a fitness tracker—it's your personal health coach. This cutting-edge wearable device continuously monitors your body's key metrics and provides personalised, science-backed feedback to help you sleep better, train smarter, and recover faster. title: Chief. Nutrition Collagen Powder Chocolate 450g
description: Chief. Collagen Powder Chocolate supports glowing skin, stronger nails, muscle recovery, joints and tendons, and gut health with a deliciously indulgent yet sugar-free Collagen Protein! Made from hydrolysed grass-fed bovine collagen, it contains Type I and III collagen with a highly bioavailable molecular weight of <1kDa. Tested to be free from heavy metals, pesticides, and herbicides like Glyphosate. The rich dark chocolate flavour combines the antioxidants of raw cacao with the subtle sweetness of monk fruit. Perfect for chocolate 'milk', hot chocolate, mixed with yoghurt, smoothies, coffee, or even baking—delicious and nutritious in every way!

title: Thorne NAC - N-Acetylcysteine 90's
description: Thorne NAC (N-Acetylcysteine) is a powerful antioxidant that helps optimise glutathione production and replenishment, supporting overall body health. With its ability to break up mucus, NAC aids in clearing congested lungs and sinuses, while enhancing immune function and promoting a healthy inflammatory response. title: BIX Salt Electrolyte Caps Box of 16
description: Bix Salt Electrolyte Caps – a reliable solution for athletes and outdoor enthusiasts to stay hydrated and maintain electrolyte balance during intense activities. Each tablet contains 250mg of sodium and 105mg of potassium, essential electrolytes to help prevent cramps, maintain endurance, and support proper muscle function. Conveniently packaged in a blister pack of 15 tablets, these salt tablets are easy to carry, ensuring protection from moisture and environmental exposure. Whether you're running, cycling, or hiking, Bix Salt Caps are designed to keep you performing at your peak by replenishing what you lose through sweat. Each Cap Contains: Sodium - 250 mg, Potassium - 105 mg, Chloride- 375 mg

title: BIX Daily Recovery+ - Mixed Berry Box of 8
description: Bix Recovery is formulated for optimal recovery after a workout. It is a daily recovery supplement designed to boost the recovery process with its 12 vitamins and minerals. It has zero sugar and contains only natural colours and flavours. Made in Germany - the formulation is designed to maintain optimal hydration and maximises recovery after any workout. Bix Recovery reduces muscle cramps, tension & stiffness and improves energy levels, muscle endurance and cardiovascular health. Bix Recovery is developed by sports nutritionists and food scientists with the highest quality ingredients to provide you with the best hydration and recovery tablet! Vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, and contains only natural colours and flavours.

title: BIX Performance Fuel 41g - Raspberry Caffiene Box of 12
description: Bix Performance Fuel main ingredient is Isomaltulose. Isomaltulose offers specific advantages for endurance athletes compared to some other carbohydrate sources. Its slow release of glucose provides a sustained energy release, offering a more stable blood sugar level over time. This can be particularly beneficial for endurance activities as it may help avoid sudden energy crashes. Additionally, isomaltulose has a lower impact on blood sugar and insulin compared to some other high-glycemic carbohydrates, potentially aiding in prolonged endurance efforts without the risk of rapid energy spikes and subsequent drops offers specific advantages for endurance athletes compared to some other carbohydrate sources. Its slow release of glucose provides a sustained energy release, offering a more stable blood sugar level.

title: BIX The Big 40 Gel Caffeine Box of 20
description: The Bix Big 40 Gel, a game-changer in energy fueling, designed specifically for Hong Kongs intense climate and athletes needs. Unlike typical gels with only 20-30 grams of carbs and little to no electrolytes, the Big 40 delivers up to double the energy with 40 grams of carbs and 160 calories to keep you powered for longer. With 200 mg of sodium for critical electrolyte support, this gel helps combat the heat and humidity, ensuring optimal hydration and performance. Made in the UK and crafted in a natural, no-flavor formula, the Big 40 comes in two options: a 75 mg caffeine boost or a non-caffeinated version, providing straightforward, powerful energy without additives. Engineered in Hong Kong for athletes who demand more, this gel is here to elevate your endurance.

Infused with probiotics and essential botanicals like fennel, artichoke, and pineapple stem, these probiotic gummies provide an effective solution for digestive issues. They help regulate bowel movements, reduce gas, inflammation, acid reflux, and constipation, and promote a balanced intestinal ecosystem

title: Hydrolife Mango Electrolytes
description: Stay at your peak with HydroLife Mango Electrolytes, a tropical, juicy-sweet blend that hydrates, replenishes essential minerals, and supports recovery whenever your body needs a boost. Perfect for pre-, during, or post-workout, it replenishes electrolytes, enhances endurance, and speeds up recovery. With zero sugar and calories, it’s ideal for intermittent fasting and keto lifestyles. It also promotes better sleep, helps fight afternoon fatigue, and relieves headaches while curbing cravings. Whether you're rehydrating after exercise or recovering from a night out, HydroLife Mango Electrolytes keeps you refreshed, energized, and balanced all day long.

title: BIX Daily Recovery+ - Mixed Berry
description: Bix Recovery is formulated for optimal recovery after a workout. It is a daily recovery supplement designed to boost the recovery process with its 12 vitamins and minerals. It has zero sugar and contains only natural colours and flavours. Made in Germany - the formulation is designed to maintain optimal hydration and maximises recovery after any workout. Bix Recovery reduces muscle cramps, tension & stiffness and improves energy levels, muscle endurance and cardiovascular health. Bix Recovery is developed by sports nutritionists and food scientists with the highest quality ingredients to provide you with the best hydration and recovery tablet! Vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, and contains only natural colours and flavours.

title: BIX Performance Fuel 41g - Original
description: Bix Performance Fuel main ingredient is Isomaltulose. Isomaltulose offers specific advantages for endurance athletes compared to some other carbohydrate sources. Its slow release of glucose provides a sustained energy release, offering a more stable blood sugar level over time. This can be particularly beneficial for endurance activities as it may help avoid sudden energy crashes. Additionally, isomaltulose has a lower impact on blood sugar and insulin compared to some other high-glycemic carbohydrates, potentially aiding in prolonged endurance efforts without the risk of rapid energy spikes and subsequent drops offers specific advantages for endurance athletes compared to some other carbohydrate sources. Its slow release of glucose provides a sustained energy release, offering a more stable blood sugar level.

title: BIX Active Electrolytes - Passion Fruit
description: BIX ACTIVE contains the 4 main electrolytes Sodium, Magnesium, Potassium & Calcium, and is formulated to improve your Physical Performance and General well-being by keeping you hydrated during physical activity and during the day. BIX ACTIVE contains high-quality ingredients and has a clean, natural taste. Contains an optimal balance of the 4 main electrolytes: Sodium, Magnesium, Potassium, and Calcium. Formulated to hydrate at any time of the day and during physical activity. Manufactured in a GMP-certified facility in Germany using only clean and high-quality ingredients. Vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO, and contains only natural colors and flavors from red beet juice powder. Sugar-free, fat-free, and very low in calories. Each tube contains 20 effervescent tablets.

title: BIX Salt Electrolyte Caps
description: Bix Salt Electrolyte Caps – a reliable solution for athletes and outdoor enthusiasts to stay hydrated and maintain electrolyte balance during intense activities. Each tablet contains 250mg of sodium and 105mg of potassium, essential electrolytes to help prevent cramps, maintain endurance, and support proper muscle function. Conveniently packaged in a blister pack of 15 tablets, these salt tablets are easy to carry, ensuring protection from moisture and environmental exposure. Whether you're running, cycling, or hiking, Bix Salt Caps are designed to keep you performing at your peak by replenishing what you lose through sweat. Each Cap Contains: Sodium - 250 mg, Potassium - 105 mg, Chloride- 375 mg

title: BIX The Big 40 Gel
description: The Bix Big 40 Gel, a game-changer in energy fueling, designed specifically for Hong Kongs intense climate and athletes needs. Unlike typical gels with only 20-30 grams of carbs and little to no electrolytes, the Big 40 delivers up to double the energy with 40 grams of carbs and 160 calories to keep you powered for longer. With 200 mg of sodium for critical electrolyte support, this gel helps combat the heat and humidity, ensuring optimal hydration and performance. Made in the UK and crafted in a natural, no-flavor formula, the Big 40 comes in two options: a 75 mg caffeine boost or a non-caffeinated version, providing straightforward, powerful energy without additives. Engineered in Hong Kong for athletes who demand more, this gel is here to elevate your endurance.

title: Calecim Recovery Night Complex
description: Calecim Recovery Night Complex is a clinically proven post-treatment mask powered by biological stem cell proteins. Designed to cool, comfort, and repair sensitised or damaged skin, this fast-acting formula targets redness and inflammation. Ideal for dry, tired, or stressed skin, it helps to restore the skin’s moisture barrier, leaving the complexion refreshed and revived. Medically formulated for optimal results, it’s the perfect addition to any post-treatment skincare routine.

title: Pneuma V2 THREE Bar - High Intensity Performance Nose Tape - Clear Transparent
description: Pneuma V2 THREE Bar - High Intensity Performance Nose Tape – Clear Transparent is designed to maximise airflow and support your performance during intense physical activity. Featuring triple bars for superior support, it ensures effortless and comfortable nasal breathing, which is essential for better endurance, sharper focus, and faster recovery. By optimising oxygen intake and reducing fatigue, it helps you stay in control throughout your workout. Whether you’re a runner, cyclist, or gym enthusiast, this nose tape is the ideal choice for enhancing your performance and supporting an active lifestyle.

title: Pneuma Recovery Sleep Nose Tape - Ice White
description: Pneuma Recovery Sleep Nose Tape is designed to enhance your sleep routine by promoting deeper, more restorative rest. This tape supports nasal breathing, which encourages proper airflow for better oxygen exchange, helping to regulate your nervous system and reduce snoring. As you prepare for bed, it also aids in mindfulness and relaxation, calming your mind for a peaceful night’s sleep. By supporting natural nasal breathing, you wake up feeling refreshed, energised, and ready to tackle the day ahead. Experience the power of better sleep through better breathing with Recovery Sleep Tape.

title: Pneuma PowerLite Performance Nose Tape - SmallFit - Black

These smaller strips gently open both nostrils, promoting better airflow and comfortable breathing, making them ideal for activities like runs, gym sessions, or long walks. Nasal breathing is key to optimizing oxygen intake, improving focus, and enhancing recovery. By breathing through your nose, you can stay in control, perform better, and feel more energised throughout your workout. title: Thorne Vitamin K2 liquid 30ml
description: Thorne's vitamin K2 supplies 1 mg of vitamin K2 per drop. Vitamin K2 offers robust support for bone and cardiovascular health, outweighing the properties of Vitamin K1. Its non-oestrogenic effects make it an ideal choice to aid individuals with a variety of conditions such as those recovering from stroke or transplant surgery, dialysis patients and even people suffering from Parkinson's disease. Providing 1 mg of vitamin K2 per drop in an easy-to-use metered liquid dispenser.

title: Thorne Vitamin D + K2 liquid 30ml
description: Thorne’s Vitamin D + K2 Liquid combines these two powerful vitamins to enhance bone health, cardiovascular support, and immune function. Maintaining optimal vitamin D levels throughout life is crucial for strong bones and a robust immune system. Adding vitamin K2 ensures that calcium is effectively directed to the bones, helping to protect soft tissues, such as the arteries and kidneys, from harmful calcification. The combination of vitamins D3 and K2 provides greater benefits together than either vitamin offers alone. This formula includes MK-4, the most clinically studied form of vitamin K. The vitamin D is in its D3 form, which is more potent and better absorbed than D2. With these vital nutrients, you’re investing in a healthier future for your bones, heart, and overall well-being.

title: Thorne EnteroMend 168g
description: Thorne’s EnteroMend is a powerful supplement designed to support overall intestinal health by maintaining a healthy inflammatory response in the GI tract, soothing mucous membranes, and promoting bowel regularity and colonic permeability. Trusted by athletes, every batch is NSF Certified for Sport, ensuring the highest standards of quality and compliance. This unique formula combines the mucosa-protective benefits of L-glutamine with highly absorbable botanical complexes, such as Meriva and Casperome—phytosomes of curcumin and Boswellia—for enhanced absorption and a balanced inflammatory response. EnteroMend also includes DaltonMax 700®, a potent 200:1 aloe extract that soothes intestinal mucous membranes, and Sunfiber, which supports healthy gut flora, normal butyrate levels, and regular bowel movements. With a delicious orange-vanilla flavour, EnteroMend is easy to mix in water or your favourite beverage, making it a convenient and enjoyable way to support your digestive health.

title: Thorne Basic Prenatal 90’s
description: Pre-conception, pregnancy, and nursing are crucial times for optimising a mother’s health and nutrition, benefiting both mother and baby. During this period, overall nutritional and caloric needs increase significantly, but it can be challenging to meet these requirements through diet alone. Thorne’s Basic Prenatal is specially formulated to support the unique needs of conception, pregnancy, and breastfeeding. With well-absorbed, tissue-ready vitamins and minerals, this gentle, non-constipating formula ensures that mothers receive essential nutrients to promote optimal health for both themselves and their babies.

title: Thorne Basic B Complex 60’s
description: Thorne’s Basic B Complex provides a powerful blend of active B vitamins, ensuring optimal absorption and supporting overall health. This formula promotes cellular energy production, aids in the conversion of carbohydrates into energy, and supports a healthy metabolism of fats and proteins. It also enhances the function of the nervous system and contributes to healthy red blood cell formation. Unlike many B vitamin supplements, Thorne’s Basic B Complex is not derived from yeast, making it an excellent choice for those looking for a highly bioavailable B vitamin supplement to support their active lifestyle.

title: NakedLab Bamboo Pillowcase Set (Stripe)
description: NakedLab - We're thrilled to introduce our latest addition to the bedding collection - new patterned pillowcases! Like the rest of our products, these pillowcases are made from premium bamboo fabric and are named after stunning holiday destinations for a touch of wanderlust. We understand that everyone has their own unique style and preferences when it comes to bedding, which is why we wanted to offer even more options for our customers to create their perfect sleep oasis. Our pillowcases are ultra-soft and superbly comfortable. Crafted with 100% organic and sustainable bamboo, the silken texture of BambooSilk pillowcases are gentle on hair and skin, preventing frizz and knots so you wake up looking and feeling well rested. Due to the smooth texture of the fabric under different lighting conditions, colours might vary from the photos.* Photos are all taken under natural AM sunlight.* 2x pillowcases. Packed in a reusable BambooSilk bag

title: Maria Åkerberg Eye Cream More 15ml
description: Maria Åkerberg Eye Cream, More with Rosehip Seed Oil, Sea Buckthorn Oil and extracts from the Persian Silk Tree, provides a smoothing and firming effect on the skin around the eyes. The product has a draining effect on swelling and prevents dark undereye circles. The combination of Shea Butter, Jojoba Oil and different variants of herbal salts increases the moisture content of the skin, resulting in a smoothing effect.The Rosehip Seed Oil in Eye Cream More comes from the seeds of rose bushes. It contains Vitamin A which helps renew the skin. The extracts from the bark of the Persian Silk Tree have a firming effect on the skin. That is what gives Eye Cream More its amazing lifting, smoothing and draining qualities. The product contains natural self-preservatives. Winner, Product of the Year – Organic Beauty Awards 2017.

title: Maria Åkerberg Serum C 30ml
description: Maria Åkerberg Serum C is a moisturising serum and an energy boost for dull skin. It is suitable for all skin types. Serum C is a perfect after-sun product, it is anti-inflammatory and it slows down the skin’s ageing process. When used regularly over a long period of time, Serum C has a brightening effect on hyperpigmentation. A unique stabilised concentrate from oranges constitute 10% of the ingredients in Serum C. This provides a generous amount of Vitamin C, which boosts the skin’s lustre and has a slightly exfoliating effect. NB People suffering from citrus allergies may be sensitive to Serum C. In addition to Vitamin C, Serum C contains Vitamin A, B1, B2, B6, H, PP and amino acids, AHA (fruit acids) and Polyphenols. Vitamin A stimulates the formation of collagen. Since UVA radiation from the sun destroys Vitamin A, it is extra important to supply the skin with Vitamin A after sunbathing. B6 regulates facial oil production. Therefore, Serum C is also suitable for people with oily skin and mild acne. Polyphenols are antioxidants that not only protect cells, but also improve skin micro-circulation and has an anti-inflammatory effect. The product contains natural self preservatives. Winner, Product of the Year - Organic Beauty Awards 2021

title: Maria Åkerberg Hair & Body Shampoo Beautiful 250ml
description: Maria Åkerberg Hair & Body Shampoo Beautiful is a gentle, nourishing shampoo and a refreshing shower gel in one. It revitalises dry, dull and distressed hair, while providing a lovely scent of Lemon, Bergamot, Orange and Cardamom. Hair & Body Shampoo can be used daily, to wash hair and body. It can also be used as a facial cleanser on normal skin and as a shaving cream. The gentle cleansing ingredients are derived primarily from coconut and corn, which help the skin retain its natural and protective oil balance. Therefore, the product does not dehydrate skin and hair like regular soap. The product contains natural self preservatives.

title: Maria Åkerberg Night Cream More (Sea Buckthorn/Peppermint) 100ml
description: Winner of Product of the Year at the Organic Beauty Awards 2020, Maria Åkerberg Night Cream More is a nourishing cream specially formulated for mature skin. It softens visible signs of ageing while deeply moisturising dry skin. Packed with Rapeseed Oil and Sea Buckthorn Oil, this revitalising cream strengthens the skin's protective barrier with antioxidants, fatty acids, and vitamin C. Essential oils of Orange, Rose, and Peppermint offer a fresh scent and smooth results. Orange Oil promotes circulation and soothes, while Rose Oil regenerates and increases hydration, making this cream ideal for sensitive, mature skin. Natural self-preservatives ensure freshness and effectiveness.

title: Ion Silver Ionosil Electro Colloidal Silver
description: Ion Silver Ionosil Electro Colloidal Silver is a product that is classified as a water disinfection product with a strength of 10 ppm, equivalent to 100 micrograms of silver per 10 ml of product. Ionosil Electro Colloidal Silver is approved for water purification. A laboratory result showed that Ionosil eliminated all antibiotic resistant bacteria in a few minutes. Also proven that it has ability to kill heterotrophic and coliform bacteria in bottled drinking water, Ionosil’s ability to kill viruses and fungi. Made in Sweden.

title: Bräutigam's Organic Garlic Juice
description: Bräutigam's Organic Garlic Juice is a pharmaceutical-grade food supplement made from freshly picked, organic garlic grown on small, toxin-free family-owned farms across Europe. With a unique cold aqueous extraction process, this juice ensures maximum bioavailability of its active compounds, including allicin, known for its powerful anti-bacterial, anti-fungal, and antioxidant properties. Valued for centuries, garlic is celebrated for its healing abilities, from supporting immune function to enhancing circulation and detoxifying the body. With no dyes, fillers, or extenders, this highly concentrated juice is ideal for supporting overall health and well-being.

title: Waveex Mobile Chip protection
description: We have reached an age where we're always surrounded by smartphones, tablets, laptops and other devices – texting, emailing, posting on social media, watching TikToks. Waveex's mobile chip protection balances out the electromagnetic fields and makes them tolerable for our bodies.

title: lucid 360 Wellness DNA Test
description: Did you know that taking a DNA test can reveal your genetic makeup, such as what exercise suits you and how your body processes food, guiding you in achieving your optimal health and wellness routine? The lucid 360 Wellness DNA test will provide you with personalised diet and nutrition guidance, as well as fitness and skincare recommendations based on your genetic profile. You will also have a one-to-one consultation with a nutritionist that will look at your results in-depth. Our lab is CAP and CLIA accredited for the most accurate genotyping, along with our US-patented algorithm for the most precise risk assessments based on your ancestry and ethnicity.
